arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal, Tottenham hold talks with 25-year-old Premier League defender
arts.sum: Crystal Palace defender Tyrick Mitchell is attracting the attention of Europe’s leading clubs. Mitchell’s contract with Crystal Palace expires in June 2025 and the club is trying to tie him down to an extension. Sources have informed CaughtOffside that Mitchell is not keen on committing his long-term future to the club amid interest from multiple […] The post Exclusive: Arsenal, Tottenham hold talks with 25-year-old Premier League defender appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham January transfer briefing: who are they after, what do they need and who might leave?
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: There may be no Premier League team more in need of new recruits this month than Tottenham, who have been blighted by injuries particularly in defence.

arts.ttl: Transfer ‘very likely this January’ as Tottenham in mix to sign 26-year-old this winter
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been linked with a multitude of players ahead of the winter market as the club look to improve their season. Spurs are currently 12th in the Premier League and Ange Postecoglou has already said people behind the scenes are working hard to try and find some solutions during the January window. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Wolves in the Premier League this weekend as Ange Postecoglou looks to relieve some of the pressure on his position. A defeat at Nottingham Forest on Boxing Day was the club’s fourth loss in five Premier League games. arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Wolves Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Wolves will look to maintain their revival under Vitor Pereira when they take on on-of-sorts Tottenham in the Premier League today. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, ...

arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham vs Wolves
arts.sum: Tottenham vs Wolves kicks off at 3pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 2.30pm. The show begins about 30 minutes before kick-off at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium, bringing supporters team news and talking points before the 3pm start.

arts.ttl: Alfie Dorrington Tottenham decision looms as Ange Postecoglou waits on Radu Dragusin injury news
arts.sum: If Dragusin sits out the Wolves match through injury and Dorrington watches on from the bench with someone else filling in at centre-back then you would have to question if he will ever start a senior game for Tottenham. Archie Gray has filled in well at the heart of defence recently but Tottenham may now be in a position where the 18-year-old is their most experienced centre-back against Wolves.
